_comment: Maps known Delinea error signatures to documentation. Matching is 100% in-browser; log text never leaves the device. 'match' is a case-insensitive substring tested against the PII-scrubbed log line. Entries with 'url' link to public articles (support.delinea.com or docs.delinea.com). Entries with 'source':'confluence' show the title only (no link). Sorted by match length (longest first) so the most specific signature wins. Sourced from the Salesforce Knowledge export + Delinea public docs + internal Confluence.

signatures.match: The authentication policy of the remote server does not allow the use of saved credentials
signatures.title: RDP Sessions failing with, "The authentication policy of the remote server does not allow the use of saved credentials"

signatures.match: You are not connected to a valid instance and clustering is not enabled
signatures.title: INTERNAL: Secret Server error: You are not connected to a valid instance and clustering is not enabled. Please contact your administrator.
